title: Cyrus cylinder · mapping
notes: Re-translating the cylinder line by line. Goal: separate what is actually inscribed from what 20th-century nationalism made it say. Lines 13-19 are the contested section. The 'freed the captives' phrasing is downstream of a Victorian framing, not the Akkadian.
next_action: Compare Schaudig 2001 with Finkel 2013 on lines 30-35. The two readings diverge on what 'restored' actually meant.
